_comment: US macro events with impact levels for the Morning Plan. NFP (first Friday 08:30, HIGH) and jobless claims (Thursday 08:30, LOW) are DERIVED in calendar.py. FOMC dates below are exact. CPI / Core PCE / PPI / Retail / GDP / ISM date lists are user-fillable from forexfactory.com or BLS/BEA/FRB schedules (paste ISO YYYY-MM-DD into 'dates'); impact defaults live in calendar.py _CURATED. Times are ET.
